arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Ipswich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bournemouth host Ipswich in the Premier League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV and live stream, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Ipswich Town injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Justin Kluivert a doubt for Bournemouth’s match with Ipswich as Andoni Iraola offers injury update
arts.sum: The Cherries’ top scorer played the full 90 minutes in the FA Cup quarter-final loss to Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man Utd hold key advantage in five-way battle for Liam Delap and begin transfer talks
arts.sum: Liam Delap is said to have a release clause in his contract if Ipswich Town are relegated from the Premier League and Manchester United are among five clubs targeting the striker

arts.ttl: Iraola 'loving life' at Bournemouth amid Real Madrid and Spurs talk
arts.sum: On June 19 2023, a relatively unknown Spanish manager became the first foreign boss of AFC Bournemouth. Fast forward 652 days and that man isn't unknown anymore. In fact, he's so well known right now - he's one of the hottest prospects in the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed

arts.ttl: Bournemouth v Ipswich: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Bournemouth v Ipswich: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Al-Nassr Targeting £235m West Ham, Bournemouth and Brighton Trio
arts.sum: West Ham United, Bournemouth and Brighton & Hove Albion are in danger of being raided by Saudi Pro League big-spenders Al-Nassr

arts.ttl: Justin Kluivert injury: Andoni Iraola reveals latest on Bournemouth star before Ipswich clash
arts.sum: Dutch forward is a possible doubt for Premier League return after knock suffered against Manchester City in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues Erling Haaland injury update after Man City star left Bournemouth on crutches following FA Cup win
arts.sum: Haaland limped out of the 2-1 win over Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium and was later spotted on crutches while wearing a protective boot.
